# Live Product Tour: Designing Real-Time Journeys

Webinar

# Live Product Tour: Designing Real-Time Journeys

September 11, 2025

60 minutes

On demand

## Description

Join Peter Oleson, Senior Solutions Consultant at Iterable, for a live walkthrough of how to build dynamic, automated Journeys that engage customers in real time.

In this session, you’ll learn:

*   How Journeys simplify automation with a visual, drag-and-drop builder
*   Ways to orchestrate personal, multi-channel experiences across email, SMS, push, and more
*   Real-world examples of onboarding, celebration, engagement, and re-engagement moments
*   Best practices to start small, test continuously, and scale with confidence

Whether you’re just beginning or ready to refine your approach, you’ll walk away with practical strategies to move beyond batch-and-blast and create memorable customer moments.
